description_long: This is a chocolate muffin with a rounded, slightly irregular dome and a rich, dark brown color. The top features a patch of glossy chocolate frosting adorned with chopped nuts, adding texture and visual interest. The muffin's surface is rough and craggy, with visible cracks and crevices typical of a baked good. The base is slightly darker and more compact, suggesting a denser crumb. There is no visible wrapper, exposing the muffin's baked exterior all around. The muffin appears appetizing and freshly baked, with a moist, soft texture implied by its appearance.
description: A chocolate muffin topped with glossy chocolate frosting and chopped nuts, featuring a rough, craggy surface and no visible wrapper.
description_view_0: Front view shows the chocolate muffin with a prominent patch of chocolate frosting and chopped nuts on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the glossy frosting and nut topping, with more of the muffin's rough, baked surface visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the muffin's plain, craggy surface with no visible frosting or toppings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals a small drip of frosting and a few nuts, with the rest of the muffin's textured surface exposed.
